title: 10x 7cm Colourful Butterflies On Sticks Party Wedding Decoration Art DIY Garden
features: Ideal for rockery, grass, flower beds and flower pots sure to liven up any garden space
Butterfly is attached to a small spring and will move with the wind
Comes in a random assortment of colours
description: Product Description Innovation for Everyday Living Innovation for Everyday Living Accessotech is where smart technology meets modern lifestyle. We’re proud to bring you an ever-growing range of affordable, high-quality products designed to make everyday life easier — from tech essentials and beauty tools to home and travel accessories. Our goal is simple: to deliver innovation, reliability, and great value in every product. Whether you’re organising your workspace, enhancing your beauty routine, or staying connected on the go — Accessotech keeps life running smoothly. Designed Around You Smart & Practical: We design products that make sense — practical, durable, and built for daily use. Modern Lifestyle Focus: From technology to beauty, each item is created with convenience and quality in mind. Trusted Performance: Reliable accessories and tools that deliver every time — whatever your routine. Accessible Value: Premium quality without the premium price tag, bringing innovation within reach. Everyday Confidence: Products you can depend on — tested for durability, safety, and comfort. Style. Simplicity. Strength. Accessotech celebrates modern living — combining the elegance of beauty with the power of technology. Whether it’s a sleek makeup organiser or a high-speed charging cable, every item is crafted to look great and perform brilliantly. Modern Design Crafted with style and ergonomics that suit everyday life. Premium Materials Made from high-grade components that last longer than standard alternatives. Reliable Functionality Designed for consistent performance across all categories. Everyday Versatility Perfect for home, work, or travel — Accessotech products are built to fit seamlessly into any lifestyle. Accessotech – Smart. Stylish. Dependable. Accessotech – Smart. Stylish. Dependable. From tech accessories to beauty must-haves, Accessotech is here to elevate your everyday essentials. Discover reliable design, thoughtful features, and exceptional value — all crafted to help you live smarter, look better, and feel more connected.

product_details_tab_data.Title: Accessotech 10x 7cm Colourful Butterflies On Sticks Party Wedding Decoration Art DIY Garden
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Garden › Garden Décor › Garden Sculptures & Statues › Statues
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: This product is designed to be inserted into the ground. Always ensure the area is clear of people and pets before and during installation. Be cautious of the sharp pointed end to avoid injury. Once installed, the butterfly may move with the wind, so ensure it is securely anchored to prevent dislodgement and potential harm.
